tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides game mechanics overview but no specific physics parameters (velocity, acceleration, gravity values, or sub-pixel system details). Game features varied control schemes for different aircraft/equipment types rather than traditional platformer movement.
